strategy_engine.notes: Bitget demo profile. Sandboxed by default: execution_mode per strategy controls sandbox routing, so no live order is placed until Bitget's gated sandbox write test has proven the venue. Credentials resolve from BITGET_DEMO_API_KEY / BITGET_DEMO_SECRET_KEY / BITGET_DEMO_PASSPHRASE. Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution.

notes: Bitget demo only. New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes.
